title: trudoc verify scripts, CI runtime, and audit hardening

source.subject: fix(docs): restore book memes, trudoc verify scripts, CI runtime and audit

body:
## Outcome

Restore book memes, trudoc verify scripts, CI runtime and audit.

## Context

- Workstream **ci-release** — see workstream summary on the catalog.
- **trudoc** Zod/frontmatter verification guards platform-spec metadata in CI.

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`f57377a`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/f57377a) — fix(docs): restore book memes, trudoc verify scripts, CI runtime and audit
